name: Priya Nair
goals: Have fun exploring AI image generation without needing to learn prompt syntax
Get surprising or inspiring results quickly with minimal setup
Share interesting visuals with friends or on social media
frustrations: The 3D interface is visually impressive but the learning curve for the categories is unclear
Randomise produces overwhelming output — hard to know what changed or why it looks good
No indication of what the LLM expansion actually added to the base prompt
relevant_behaviours: Lands on the app via a shared link or social post, not through organic search
Clicks Randomise first before reading any category labels
Spends most time in the output panel reading and copy-pasting the generated prompt
Returns only occasionally — typically when a friend shares a specific configuration
